Ceiling Finishes

Texture. Repair. Finish.

Ceiling texture services.

Built for homeowners who want the ceiling fixed properly, blended professionally, and finished with a modern construction look.

⌂

Ceiling Texture

New texture application for basements, renovations, additions, and interior finishing projects.

✦

Texture Repair

Patch matching, crack repair, water-damage areas, uneven ceiling spots, and texture blending.

▧

Popcorn & Knockdown

Classic popcorn texture, modern knockdown finishes, and clean resurfacing options.

◫

Skim Coating

Smooth prep, sanding, leveling, and ceiling refinishing before paint or final texture.

◆

Interior Construction

Ceiling finishing tied into drywall, basement finishing, framing touchups, and remodel work.

✓

Elite Job Finish

Protected floors, clean edges, careful prep, and a sharper final look.

Where We Work

We mainly serve Edmonton and the surrounding communities for ceiling texture, repairs, refinishing, and interior construction work.

  • Mainly Edmonton
  • Surrounding Edmonton areas
  • Residential ceiling projects
  • Commercial ceiling projects
